description: Assistant provides unsupported details when source material is missing
mitigation: Require source-grounded answers and refusal when evidence is missing

description: Assistant suggests guarantees or promises outside approved process
mitigation: Add guardrail language and human review for sensitive cases

description: Assistant interprets ambiguous prompts too broadly
mitigation: Test ambiguous prompts and require clarifying questions

description: Assistant content becomes outdated as procedures change
mitigation: Set review cadence and content owner

description: Assistant gives guidance that should require review
mitigation: Route high-risk topics to human reviewer
